NEXT STEPS · 08 OF 08
Next steps

A scoped, sober path
to your first regulator-defensible workload.

  1. 01

    Architecture review

    90 minutes with your CISO and platform leads. We walk the boundary, the control plane and the audit trail.

  2. 02

    Cost model

    Built on your actual usage profile. Compared against your current API spend. Predictable at scale.

  3. 03

    Scoped proof of concept

    One workload, one regulator, one success metric. Six weeks. We do not multiply scope.

  4. 04

    Production hand-off

    Runbook, audit pack and the on-call schedule. Your team operates it. We are on the other end of the line.

Book the deep-dive

Bring whoever
owns the risk.

The first session is scoped to architecture and security. We send a calendar invite from a human, not a bot, within two business days.

deepdive@ardacomputing.com · ardacomputing.com/deep-dive
